title: Specify Custom (Public and Company) Holidays Across Monday
excerpt:
Description
I often use the ‘Timeline’ column in my Monday boards which has the handy feature of a countdown number of days when you hover over it. However, this is not accurate as it doesn’t reflect our public holidays …

posts.author: saoirsemcgarry (Saoirse McGarry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I often use the ‘Timeline’ column in my Monday boards which has the handy feature of a countdown number of days when you hover over it. However, this is not accurate as it doesn’t reflect our public holidays here in Ireland or our specific company holidays. I would like to have a fundamental setting in Monday that allows you to customize and specify non-working data (outside of the weekend) that can be applied to your data everywhere.

What are you trying to achieve

Integrate custom holidays with timeline column

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. We just launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. SuperPlanner can add any type of off days you’d like and as many types as you’d like. Try at out for free…
https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
